Update Month
Upload a monthly Email Overview CSV or XLSX to add or refresh a month in the database

Upload Monthly Email Overview

Drop your [Month Year] Email Overview.csv or .xlsx file here.
Format: Date Sent · Subject Line · Open Rate · Click Rate · OKUPDRs · Sets · Closes
The Date Sent column can contain HYPERLINK formulas — broadcast links will be preserved.

Drop CSV or XLSX here · or click to browse

✓
Saved to your browser database. Visible across all tabs.
Instructions

1. Export your monthly overview as CSV from your Email Report spreadsheet

2. Make sure it has the standard 7-column format (Date Sent, Subject Line, Open Rate, Click Rate, OKUPDRs, Sets, Closes)

3. Upload here — the system auto-detects the month from the dates

4. If a month already exists, uploading will replace it with the new data

5. OKUPDRs/Sets/Closes from Salesforce should be merged in before uploading
